scripts.update-source: mkdir -p src/types && cp $DEV/node/packages/ts.ui-core/src/ts.ui/public/logic.ts src/logic.ts && cp $DEV/node/packages/ts.ui-core/src/ts.ui/public/types/logic.ts src/types/logic.ts
scripts.postinstall: rm -rf node_modules/state-local/lib/cjs node_modules/state-local/lib/umd node_modules/@monaco-editor/loader/lib/cjs node_modules/@monaco-editor/loader/lib/es node_modules/monaco-editor/dev node_modules/monaco-editor/esm
